nasb.text: “Then you shall make curtains of goats’ hair for a tent over the tabernacle; you shall make eleven curtains in all.

esv.text: “You shall also make curtains of goats’ hair for a tent over the tabernacle; eleven curtains shall you make.

cnv.text: “你要用山羊毛做幔子，作會幕上面的帳棚，你要做十一幅幔子。

ccb.text: “要用山羊毛织十一幅幔子作圣幕的罩棚，
